```{python}
#| include: false
import yaml

# Load resume data
with open('/Users/shakes/DevProjects/jobsearch/templates/resume/data/resume-data.yml', 'r') as f:
    resume_data = yaml.safe_load(f)

personal = resume_data['personal']
experience = resume_data['experience']
education = resume_data['education']
skills = resume_data['skills']
```

```{=typst}
#import "@preview/awesomecv:0.1.0": *

#show: resume.with(
  author: (
    firstname: "`{python} personal['firstname']`",
    lastname: "`{python} personal['lastname']`",
    email: "`{python} personal['email']`",
    phone: "`{python} personal['phone']`",
    github: "`{python} personal['github']`",
    linkedin: "`{python} personal['linkedin']`",
    address: "`{python} personal['address']`",
    positions: `{python} tuple(personal['positions'])`,
  ),
  profile-picture: none,
  date: datetime.today().display(),
  language: "en",
  colored-headers: true,
  show-footer: false,
  paper-size: "us-letter",
)
#line(length: 100%, stroke: 1pt + gray)

`{python} resume_data['summary']['default']`

= Experience

```{python}
#| output: asis
for exp in experience:
    # Create Typst resume entry
    print(f"""
#resume-entry(
  title: "{exp['title']}",
  location: "{exp['location']}",
  date: "{exp['date']}",
  description: "{exp['company']}",
)

#resume-item[""")
    
    # Add bullet points
    for bullet in exp['bullets']:
        # Replace $ with \$ for Typst
        text = bullet['text'].replace('$', '\\$')
        print(f"  - *{text.split('**')[1] if '**' in text else text.split('*')[0]}*{text.split('**')[2] if '**' in text else text.split('*')[1] if '*' in text else text}")
    
    print("]")
```

```{=typst}
= Education

```{python}
#| output: asis
for edu in education:
    print(f"""
#resume-entry(
  title: "{edu['school']}",
  location: "{edu['location']}",
  date: "{edu['date']}",
  description: "{edu['degree']}",
)""")
    
    if 'notes' in edu:
        print("\n#resume-item[")
        notes_str = " | ".join(edu['notes'])
        print(f"  - {notes_str}")
        print("]")
```

```{=typst}
= Skills

```{python}
#| output: asis
for category, skill_list in skills.items():
    category_name = category.replace('_', ' ').title()
    
    # Create skill items with emphasis on first few
    skill_items = []
    for i, skill in enumerate(skill_list):
        if i < 3:  # Emphasize first 3 skills
            skill_items.append(f'strong("{skill}")')
        else:
            skill_items.append(f'"{skill}"')
    
    skills_tuple = f"({', '.join(skill_items)})"
    
    print(f"""
#resume-skill-item(
  "{category_name}",
  {skills_tuple},
)""")
```
